subject: docs(process): add AI mistake — docs must be updated with code, not after
body:
Added AI_MISTAKES.md entry for treating documentation as a follow-up
instead of part of the task. Added explicit AI Note to CLAUDE.md:
"Docs are part of the task, not a follow-up" with rule to always
commit code + docs together.

Tags: docs, process, ai-mistakes
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch
title: add AI mistake — docs must be updated with code, not after
